channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Rover Promo Codes and Deals: Get Up to $50 This Month
item.description: Looking for reliable pet care? Use a Rover promo code or referral link to save on dog walking, pet sitting, and boarding services this month.

item.title: Another New ‘Lord of the Rings’ Movie Is in the Works
item.description: 'Shadow of the Past' will see Tolkien superfan Stephen Colbert join forces with the architects of the 'Lord of the Rings' movie saga.
